title: Ambient Layer Calibration
description: Calibration metrics: shadow verdicts, replay precision/recall, tier2 pass rate, feedback labels

panels.title: Shadow Verdicts Per Day
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, COUNT(*) as total FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'shadow_verdict' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Daily Shadow Block Rate (%)
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN verdict = 'block' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) as block_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'shadow_verdict' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Check Verdicts by Type
panels.query: SELECT check_type, verdict, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name IN ('check', 'shadow_verdict') AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY check_type, verdict ORDER BY count DESC

panels.title: Verdict Distribution Over Time
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('hour', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as hour, verdict, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name IN ('check', 'shadow_verdict') AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY hour, verdict ORDER BY hour

panels.title: Top Blocked Patterns
panels.query: SELECT reason, COUNT(*) as count FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name IN ('check', 'shadow_verdict') AND verdict = 'block' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY reason ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Replay Block Rate Trend
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN verdict = 'block' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) as block_pct FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'replay_verdict' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day

panels.title: Sessions by Outcome
panels.query: SELECT COALESCE(session_outcome, 'unknown') as outcome, COUNT(DISTINCT trace_id) as sessions FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'session' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '7 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY outcome

panels.title: Feedback Labels Per Day
panels.query: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('day', TO_TIMESTAMP(_timestamp / 1000000)) as day, COUNT(*) as total_labels FROM default WHERE service_name = 'dev-loop-ambient' AND operation_name = 'feedback' AND _timestamp >= CAST(NOW() - INTERVAL '30 DAYS' AS BIGINT) / 1000 GROUP BY day ORDER BY day
